title: TotemBalancer
description: Makes totems active for a short time when rightclicking.
body:
# Totem Balancer
## Functionality
Totems can no longer be activated simply by holding them.
Instead, you must right-click the totem to start a 30-second timer, during which the totem saves you from death.  
To prevent instant death from other players, this plugin also limits the maximum damage a player can deal to another player to 8 hearts with a single hit.

## Customisation
In the config, you can configure:
- The time the totem is active
- The maximum damage that can be dealt
- Weather a warning should be shown when a player puts a totem in his offhand

![Gif showing a player activate a totem, which shows a cooldown bar in his actionbar. He then jumps into lava and the totem activates](https://i.imgur.com/7ETW1h9.gif)
